scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,admin,paramcad -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:paramcad"
scripts.dev:api: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location apps/api; if (Test-Path ../../.venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe) { ../../.venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe main:app --reload --port 8016 } else { python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8016 }"
scripts.dev:paramcad: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (!(Test-Path engines/AI-ParamCAD/mvnw.cmd)) { Write-Error 'AI-ParamCAD engine not found. Clone https://github.com/Roins-hub/AI-ParamCAD.git to engines/AI-ParamCAD first.'; exit 1 }; Set-Location engines/AI-ParamCAD; .\mvnw.cmd compile exec:java '-Dexec.mainClass=com.example.aiparamcad.demo.DemoGuiServer' '-Dexec.args=--port=8088'"
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @3dagent/web run lint && npm --workspace @3dagent/admin run lint
scripts.build: npm --workspace @3dagent/web run build && npm --workspace @3dagent/admin run build
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:web && npm run build:api:desktop && npm --workspace @3dagent/desktop run dist
